input.paragraph_text: "乖孙，来吃糖。"奶奶总是这么唤我，声音沙哑却温柔，像冬日里的一缕阳光。我跑过去，小手捧着那颗用油纸包着的麦芽糖，甜味瞬间化开在舌尖。

paragraph_annotation.notes: 奶奶对孙女的关爱语气

expected_output.edited_text: 乖孙，来吃糖。奶奶总是这么唤我，声音沙哑却温柔，像冬日里的一缕阳光。我跑过去，小手捧着那颗用油纸包着的麦芽糖，甜味瞬间化开在舌尖。
changes_made: 去除引号内对话标点，保留语意完整
expected_output.rationale: 童话难度A级，仅去除朗读无意义的引号，保持原文完整性

input.paragraph_text: Winston Smith, his chin nuzzled into his breast in an effort to escape the vile wind, slipped quickly through the glass doors of Victory Mansions, though not quickly enough to prevent a swirl of gritty dust from entering along with him.

expected_output.edited_text: Winston Smith nuzzled his chin into his breast to escape the vile wind. He slipped quickly through the glass doors of Victory Mansions. But he was not quick enough to prevent a swirl of gritty dust from entering along with him.
changes_made: 长句拆分为三句，每句≤30词
expected_output.rationale: 难度C级长句必须拆分，TTS合成更自然
